Orphan-sweep policy + location.sweep_home: Separate sweep_orphans(con) function called from __main__._run_gui after db_init()
Orphan-sweep policy + location.run_cadence: Every app start (idempotent; sub-millisecond when N=0)
Orphan-sweep policy + location.n0_logging: Silent on N=0; INFO line only when N>0

Which tables to sweep.tables: Only real FK child tables: station_streams + station_siblings
Which tables to sweep.favorites_excluded: Favorites has no FK; v1.3 FAVES-01..04 intentionally persists track titles after station delete
Which tables to sweep.station_siblings_strategy: Single DELETE handles both a_id and b_id orphans atomically
Which tables to sweep.provider_fk_skipped: stations.provider_id is SET NULL not CASCADE; dangling ref ≠ orphan; out of scope
